name: Iowa Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together butter and sugar until fluffy.
2. Beat in chocolate syrup, then eggs one at a time.
3. Gradually beat in flour.
4. Fold in nuts if using.
5. Pour the batter into a greased cake pan (approximately 9x13 inches). The brownies do not rise much.
6. Bake at 350°F for about 30-40 minutes. If using a jelly roll pan (15x10 inches), bake for approximately 25 minutes.
7. Frost with the Iowa Brownie Icing recipe to follow. Use Hershey's Chocolate Syrup.
Note: These are more of a "cake" than traditional brownies and may benefit from additional frosting or icing.
